hooks.description: Remind about design best practices when HTML/XML is modified

action.message:
[Paper] HTML/XML modified. Verify:
- Semantic tags (header/main/nav/section/footer)
- Alt text on images
- ARIA labels on interactive elements
- Heading hierarchy (h1>h2>h3)
- Touch targets >= 44x44px
- Form labels associated with inputs

hooks.description: Remind about design best practices when CSS/SCSS is modified

action.message:
[Paper] Stylesheet modified. Verify:
- Color contrast >= 4.5:1 for text
- Use relative units (rem/em) over fixed px
- Use max-width not width for containers
- Consistent spacing (4px/8px grid)
- Focus styles on interactive elements
- prefers-reduced-motion for animations
